# Description

# [PKT-LFC-007](task-0041): Document Migration Outcomes and Reports

## Purpose

Document migration outcomes and generate reports.

## Scope

- Outcome tracking
- Report generation
- Documentation

## Implementation

1. Track outcomes
2. Generate reports
3. Document

## Acceptance Criteria

1. Outcomes tracked
2. Reports generated
3. Documented
